models.parameter_scale: unknown parameter count; local cached online/offline model.pt files are about 271 MB each, VAD model.pt is about 1.6 MB
models.parameter_scale_zh: 参数量未在本轮核实；当前本地缓存 online/offline 模型文件各约 271 MB，VAD 约 1.6 MB
models.release_date_zh: 未核实到当前本地缓存 Paraformer 基线模型的准确发布时间
models.local_weight_size: online model.pt 271MB, offline model.pt 271MB, VAD model.pt 1.6MB
public_evidence: Current LocalVoiceInput baseline using cached Paraformer online/offline and FSMN VAD models.
Official report includes open-source and industry WER tables, streaming decoding, noise robustness, code-switching, and hotword customization.

models.vendor: Alibaba / Tongyi Lab / FunAudioLLM upstream; MLX Community conversion
models.vendor_zh: 上游为阿里通义实验室 / FunAudioLLM；MLX Community 转换
models.license: Apache-2.0 upstream; MLX conversion card does not restate a separate license
models.parameter_scale: about 603M safetensors parameters reported by Hugging Face, 4-bit quantized MLX weights; upstream Fun-ASR-Nano is reported as 800M parameters
models.parameter_scale_zh: Hugging Face safetensors 元数据约 6.03 亿参数，4-bit 量化 MLX 权重；上游 Fun-ASR-Nano 标称约 8 亿参数
models.release_date_zh: MLX Community 仓库创建于 2025 年 12 月 16 日；上游 Fun-ASR-Nano 为 2025 年 12 月
models.local_weight_size: Mac local snapshot .external/models/mlx-community__Fun-ASR-Nano-2512-4bit is about 1.244GiB; model.safetensors is 1,319,780,726 bytes
models.streaming: model card claims token-by-token streaming through generate(..., stream=True); local file stream probe emitted 12 token chunks on zh_short_001, but microphone PCM session integration remains unproven
models.runtime: Apple MLX via mlx-audio-plus FunASR loader. mlx-audio 0.4.x does not support model_type=funasr. Local smoke/full eval works by exposing mlx-audio-plus 0.1.8 package files on PYTHONPATH while reusing .venv-mimo binary dependencies. Full eval has severe long-form quality risk.
public_evidence: MLX Community README says the model was converted from FunAudioLLM/Fun-ASR-Nano-2512 with mlx-audio-plus, supports multilingual transcription, custom prompting, and streaming token output.

models.vendor_zh: 阿里 / 通义千问 Qwen
models.runtime: qwen-asr transformers backend; vLLM streaming path remains follow-up
public_evidence: Official report includes public benchmarks and streaming results on LibriSpeech, FLEURS-en, and FLEURS-zh.

models.vendor_zh: 阿里 / 通义千问 Qwen
models.runtime: qwen-asr transformers backend; vLLM streaming path remains follow-up
public_evidence: Official report claims stronger quality than 0.6B with unified offline/streaming inference.

models.vendor: Alibaba / Qwen upstream; MLX Community conversion
models.vendor_zh: 上游为阿里 / 通义千问 Qwen；MLX Community 转换
models.parameter_scale_zh: 约 6 亿参数，8-bit 量化 MLX 权重
models.release_date_zh: 2026 年 1 月 29 日；MLX Community 转换仓库同日更新
models.local_weight_size: Mac local snapshot .external/models/mlx-community__Qwen3-ASR-0.6B-8bit is about 0.94GiB; model.safetensors is 1,006,229,426 bytes
models.runtime: Apple MLX via mlx-audio generic STT loader; generate(...) full eval passed; stream_transcribe(...) emits token chunks from a provided audio buffer; realtime probe confirmed no create_streaming_session/feed/step/close API on the loaded model. The active LocalVoiceInput route is the segmented-cache local HTTP wrapper; the older cumulative-recompute wrapper is retired from active code/config because long dictation responsiveness and numeric-format behavior were worse in daily use.
public_evidence: MLX-Audio Qwen3-ASR README documents 0.6B/1.7B 8-bit models, generate(...), and stream_transcribe(...).

models.vendor: Alibaba / Qwen upstream; MLX Community conversion
models.vendor_zh: 上游为阿里 / 通义千问 Qwen；MLX Community 转换
models.parameter_scale_zh: 约 17 亿参数，8-bit 量化 MLX 权重
models.release_date_zh: 2026 年 1 月 29 日；MLX Community 转换仓库同日更新
models.local_weight_size: Mac local snapshot .external/models/mlx-community__Qwen3-ASR-1.7B-8bit is about 2.30GiB; model.safetensors is 2,463,307,541 bytes
models.runtime: Apple MLX via mlx-audio generic STT loader; generate(...) full eval passed; stream_transcribe(...) emits token chunks from a provided audio buffer; realtime probe confirmed no create_streaming_session/feed/step/close API on the loaded model
public_evidence: MLX-Audio Qwen3-ASR README documents 0.6B/1.7B 8-bit models, generate(...), and stream_transcribe(...).

models.vendor: NVIDIA Nemotron upstream; MLX Community conversion
models.vendor_zh: 上游为 NVIDIA Nemotron；MLX Community 转换
models.parameter_scale_zh: 约 6 亿参数，8-bit 量化 MLX 权重
models.release_date_zh: MLX Community 仓库创建于 2026 年 6 月 4 日；上游发布时间需最终核实
models.local_weight_size: Mac local snapshot .external/models/mlx-community__nemotron-3.5-asr-streaming-0.6b-8bit is about 0.704GiB; model.safetensors is 755,598,923 bytes
models.streaming: cache_aware_file_streaming_no_session_api; local stream_generate file probe emitted cumulative chunks from provided audio, but surface probe found no create_streaming_session/feed/step/close API
models.runtime: Apple MLX via mlx-audio Nemotron ASR support; current PyPI mlx-audio 0.4.3 does not support model_type=nemotron_asr, and local main source requires a small in-process loader remapping shim. File-level full eval is very fast but quality is weak on Chinese-English technical terms. Surface probe confirms generate and stream_generate are present, but create_streaming_session is absent.
public_evidence: MLX Community README describes NVIDIA 600M cache-aware streaming FastConformer-RNNT with language-ID prompt conditioning and zh support.

models.local_weight_size: MLX int4 ASR weights about 4.53GB plus MLX audio tokenizer about 2.58GB; upstream full-precision package may be much larger
models.runtime: Apple MLX via mlx-audio; file-level local inference path; streaming path remains follow-up
public_evidence: Official benchmark page includes AISHELL-2, FLEURS-Zh, Wenet Meeting, Wenet Net, CommonVoice-Zh, Open ASR Leaderboard, dialect, lyrics, and code-switch scenarios.

models.vendor: Xiaomi MiMo upstream; MLX Community conversion
models.vendor_zh: 上游为小米 MiMo 团队；MLX Community 转换
models.parameter_scale: not a standalone ASR decoder; parameter count not separately verified in this feature
models.parameter_scale_zh: 不是独立 ASR 解码模型；本轮未单独核实 tokenizer 参数量
models.release_date_zh: 随 MiMo-V2.5-ASR 评测链路按 2026 年 6 月 2 日记录
models.local_weight_size: Mac local snapshot .external/models/MiMo-Audio-Tokenizer is about 2.4GB; model.safetensors is 2,575,648,345 bytes
models.runtime: Required companion audio tokenizer for MiMo-V2.5-ASR MLX; it is loaded by the MiMo adapter and is not evaluated as a standalone speech-to-text backend.

models.license: open weights and code; confirm exact license before use
models.parameter_scale_zh: AED 版本约 11.5 亿参数；LLM 版本 80 亿以上参数
models.release_date_zh: 2026 年 2 月 12 日发布 ASR2S/AED/VAD/LID/Punc；2026 年 2 月 25 日发布 LLM 权重
models.local_weight_size: AED model.pth.tar about 4.73GB; local smoke reported 1,152,521,275 parameters
models.runtime: official FireRedASR2S PyTorch AED backend; CPU file-level path; streaming path remains follow-up
public_evidence: Paper page reports public Mandarin, Chinese dialect/accent, English, VAD, LID, and punctuation benchmarks.

models.parameter_scale: 1.5B parameters; about 2B packaged/model size in some runtime docs
models.parameter_scale_zh: 约 15 亿参数；部分运行文档按约 20 亿模型规模描述
models.release_date_zh: 2025 年 12 月；本轮未核实到精确首发日期
models.local_weight_size: about 2B total; Hugging Face safetensors about 4.52GB
models.runtime: Transformers 5.x GLM-ASR backend; streaming path remains follow-up
public_evidence: Public deployment recipe describes Chinese, English, dialect, low-volume speech support and benchmark claims.
